steps.title: Identify the explicit goal
steps.content: The prompt directly states the objective: the student wants to specify Tristan Otto's location. This is the decisive signal for evaluating all four choices.

steps.title: Find which choice directly accomplishes the goal
steps.content:
Choice B directly accomplishes the goal by stating both where Tristan Otto is displayed (the Natural History Museum) and the museum's geographic location (Berlin, Germany).
The others either omit location (A on taxonomy, D on time period) or mention it without clearly identifying Tristan Otto's location (C discusses an unnamed specimen).
That matches choice B — B is correct.
